videoSnippet.title: The Prince and The World Champion || Gukesh vs Alireza || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Gukesh D (2732) - Firouzja, Alireza (2759) 
Norway Chess 2026 | Norway Chess (Chess.com) [06] 2026.05.27
D32 Queen's Gambit Declined, Tarrasch defence

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 c5 4.cxd5 exd5 5.Nf3 Nc6 6.Bf4 Nf6 7.e3 cxd4 8.Nxd4 Bb4 9.Bb5 Bd7 10.Ne2 O-O 11.O-O Be6 12.Qa4 Qa5 13.Bxc6 bxc6 14.Qxc6 Rfc8 15.Qa4 Ne4 16.Qxa5 Bxa5 17.Nxe4 dxe4 18.Nd4 Bc4 19.Rfc1 Bb4 20.a3 Bf8 21.b4 Bd3 22.Bc7 a6 23.Rc3 h5 24.Rac1 Re8 25.Rc6 Be7 26.h3 Bf6 27.a4 Ra7 28.Bb6 Rd7 29.Nb3 Bb2 30.Rd1 Bb5 31.Rxd7 Bxc6 32.Rd2 Ba3 33.b5 axb5 34.Nd4 Bb4 35.Rc2 Bd5 36.axb5 Ra8 37.Bc5 Ra1+ 38.Kh2 Ba5 39.Nc6 Bc7+ 40.g3 Bb3 41.Rb2 Bd1 42.Nd4 Be5 43.Rd2 Bxd4 44.Bxd4 Rb1 45.g4 h4 46.Rxd1 Rxd1 47.b6 Rb1 48.Kg2 f6 49.f4 Kf7 50.f5 g6 51.fxg6+ Kxg6 52.Kf2 f5 53.gxf5+ Kxf5 54.Ke2 Ke6 55.Kd2 Kd7 56.Kc3 Kc6 57.Bf6 Rh1 58.Kd4 Rxh3 59.Bd8 Kb7 60.Kxe4 Rh1 61.Kf3 h3 62.Kg3 h2
